name: OpenViking
description: OpenClaw context-engine plugin for memory management — powered by OpenViking

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: local = plugin starts OpenViking (like Claude Code); remote = use existing HTTP server

configPath.label: Config path (local)
configPath.help: Path to ov.conf when mode is local

baseUrl.label: OpenViking Base URL (remote)
baseUrl.help: HTTP URL when mode is remote (or ${OPENVIKING_BASE_URL})

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: OpenViking agent identity. default: follow OpenClaw ctx.agentId. Non-default: use `<this>_<OpenClaw ctx.agentId>` (sanitized to letters/digits/_/-), so the configured value acts as a prefix.

serverAuthMode.label: Server Auth Mode
serverAuthMode.help: api_key (default): send X-API-Key when configured, otherwise dev fallback to default/default tenant headers. trusted: always send accountId/userId and optionally send apiKey when configured.

apiKey.label: OpenViking API Key
apiKey.help: Optional API key for OpenViking server

accountId.label: Account ID
accountId.help: Advanced option. Tenant account ID. Only needed when using root key or trusted auth mode. With a user key the server derives identity from the key.

userId.label: User ID
userId.help: Advanced option. Tenant user ID. Only needed when using root key or trusted auth mode.

isolateUserScopeByAgent.label: Isolate User Scope By Agent
isolateUserScopeByAgent.help: Canonical namespace policy. false (default): user alias expands to viking://user/<user_id>/... . true: expands to viking://user/<user_id>/agent/<agent_id>/... . Must match the server-side account namespace policy.

isolateAgentScopeByUser.label: Isolate Agent Scope By User
isolateAgentScopeByUser.help: Canonical namespace policy. false (default): agent alias expands to viking://agent/<agent_id>/... . true: expands to viking://agent/<agent_id>/user/<user_id>/... . Must match the server-side account namespace policy.

agentScopeMode.label: Deprecated Agent Scope Mode
agentScopeMode.help: Deprecated compatibility alias for older routing. Prefer isolateUserScopeByAgent / isolateAgentScopeByUser. Explicit user_agent => false/true, explicit agent => false/false. When fully unset, the plugin defaults to false/false to match the current server-side policy.

targetUri.label: Search Target URI
targetUri.help: Default OpenViking target URI for memory search

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Extract memories from recent conversation messages via OpenViking sessions

captureMode.label: Capture Mode
captureMode.help: semantic captures all eligible user text; keyword uses trigger regex first

captureMaxLength.label: Capture Max Length
captureMaxLength.help: Maximum sanitized user text length allowed for auto-capture

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant OpenViking memories into agent context

recallResources.label: Recall Resources
recallResources.help: Include resources (viking://resources) in auto-recall and default memory_recall search. Enables account-level shared knowledge retrieval.

recallMaxContentChars.label: Recall Max Content Chars
recallMaxContentChars.help: Maximum characters per memory content in auto-recall injection

recallPreferAbstract.label: Recall Prefer Abstract
recallPreferAbstract.help: Use memory abstract instead of fetching full content when available

recallTokenBudget.label: Recall Token Budget
recallTokenBudget.help: Maximum estimated tokens for auto-recall memory injection

bypassSessionPatterns.label: Bypass Session Patterns
bypassSessionPatterns.help: Completely bypass OpenViking for matching session keys. Use * within one segment and ** across segments.

commitTokenThreshold.label: Commit Token Threshold
commitTokenThreshold.help: Minimum estimated pending tokens before auto-commit triggers. Set to 0 to commit every turn.

emitStandardDiagnostics.label: Standard diagnostics (diag JSON lines)
emitStandardDiagnostics.help: Emit structured openviking: diag {...} for assemble/afterTurn. Set false to disable.

logFindRequests.label: Log find requests
logFindRequests.help: Log tenant routing: /search/find + session messages/commit (X-OpenViking-*; not apiKey). Or set env OPENVIKING_LOG_ROUTING=1 or OPENVIKING_DEBUG=1. Local mode: subprocess stderr at info when enabled.
